channel.title: TradingMapClaw — Weekly Market Intelligence Brief
channel.description: Dual-source verified weekly watchlist observations. Research and education only — not investment advice. WATCHLIST_ONLY.

item.title: System update: verification and publication gates hardened
item.description: The candidate check is now labeled accurately as deterministic preflight; freshness is recomputed, source-domain diversity is enforced, and research records cannot auto-merge.

item.title: Verification ledger: claims, checks and open evidence
item.description: A process ledger distinguishing repository-verified findings, deterministic checks, and Mac-only claims that still require reproducible evidence.

item.title: Weekly Market Intelligence Brief 2026-W29
item.description: Weekly Market Intelligence Brief 2026-W29. Dual-source verified moves: RKLB -19.3% 5d; META +14.8% 5d; AVGO +11.0% 5d. Research and education only — not investment advice.
